name: Acorns
description: Acorns is a micro-investing and personal finance platform that helps everyday Americans grow their wealth through automated round-up investments, diversified portfolios, retirement accounts, high-yield savings, and financial wellness tools.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Acorns Partner API
hasOfferCatalog.description: The Acorns Partner API combines OAuth and Partner APIs to allow authorized third parties (partners and aggregators) to access Acorns user data on behalf of said users.
